mahabharata.topic: Karna's greatest mistake — the day he chose loyalty to Duryodhana over Krishna's offer of the empire and brotherhood with the Pandavas, knowing dharma was on the other side
Draupadi's untold marriage to five Pandavas — the hidden vow that bound the brothers forever, the queen's greatest sacrifice nobody ever named
Karna's hidden jealousy of Arjuna — the lifelong resentment that drove every choice he made, the wound his loyalty never quite covered
Arjuna's hidden truth at Drona's bird-eye test — the secret ruthlessness Drona spotted in his student, the greatest archer made by a cold heart not a kind one
Eklavya's greatest sacrifice — the hidden thumb he cut off for a guru who never taught him, the untold sin of caste that took an archer's hand
Ashwatthama's greatest sin — the hidden midnight massacre of the sleeping Pandava sons, the secret revenge that broke a Brahmin into a butcher
Arjuna's greatest fear in the Gita — the hidden truth Krishna had to reveal because the warrior nearly broke before the war, the secret regret Krishna exposed on the chariot
Eklavya's hidden truth before Drona's statue — the forest student's greatest betrayal by caste, the secret skill that surpassed Arjuna without a teacher
Arjuna's greatest vow to kill Jayadratha — the impossible promise born from his hidden grief over Abhimanyu, the secret revenge that nearly destroyed him before sundown
